content: Quante vocali ha l'inglese? Se hai detto cinque, ti sbagliavi. L'inglese britannico standard ne ha dodici, senza contare i dittonghi.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Guybrush88 (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:How many vowels does English have﹖ If you said five, you were wrong. Standard British English has twelve, not counting d
